title: Content Rating System
description: Rating systems for content advisory classifications

enumDescriptions.tv_parental: US TV Parental Guidelines (TV-Y, TV-Y7, TV-G, TV-PG, TV-14, TV-MA)
enumDescriptions.mpaa: Motion Picture Association film ratings (G, PG, PG-13, R, NC-17)
enumDescriptions.esrb: Entertainment Software Rating Board (E, E10+, T, M, AO)
enumDescriptions.bbfc: British Board of Film Classification (U, PG, 12A, 12, 15, 18, R18)
enumDescriptions.acb: Australian Classification Board (G, PG, M, MA15+, R18+)
enumDescriptions.custom: Publisher-defined rating system with free-form values
